name: Media Cleaner
description: Keep your storage clean without hassle. Works with movies and series, with Jellyfin 10.11 compatibility, Leaving Soon visibility, and optional Arr deletion delegation.
overview: Delete played media after a specified time

versions.changelog: Add Jellyfin 10.11 compatibility, Leaving Soon collection and admin dashboard support, playback safety fixes, dry-run handling, and optional Radarr/Sonarr deletion delegation.
